html:
Exclusive to:

“Rotates rotatable structures like fences, signs and chairs.”

-

The Fencing Sword is a Melee Weapon and Tool. It requires 2 Flint and 1 Spear to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Fencing Sword deals the same amount of damage as the Spear (34), but has more Durability than the Spear (200 vs the Spear's 150). It has a greatly reduced attack speed. It can also be used to rotate Wood Fences, Junky Fences, Wood Gates, Directional Signs, all types of Chairs, Mannequins, and all types of Masts placed on land, including Dragonfly Wing Masts.

Tips

  • The Fencing Sword's reduced attack speed can be mostly negated by moving slightly after attacking.
  • Since the Fencing Sword uses a Spear in its crafting recipe and has much higher durability, crafting a Fencing Sword with a low-durability Spear is an effective way to maximize resources.

Trivia

  • The Fencing Sword uses the Spear's unused "Spear Jab" animation, where the character lunges forward with the weapon to poke the enemy.
  • The Fencing Sword was introduced alongside Wickerbottom's Character Update.

Gallery

  • Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

fence_rotator
“Enguard! Re-post!”
–Wilson
“I'm gonna go fight a fence!”
–Willow
“Is sword for fences? Very strange.”
–Wolfgang
“Disorderly fences need to be brought into line.”
–Wendy
“IT CAN BE USED FOR BOTH ORDER AND DESTRUCTION. IT'S PERFECT”
–WX-78
“Sometimes sharpness is necessary to keep things aligned and orderly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sometimes you've gotta show a fence who's boss, eh?”
–Woodie
“What insidious magic. It draws power from eye rolls and groans.”
–Maxwell
“I'd take a pröper blade at my side över this övergröwn sewing needle.”
–Wigfrid
“We're allowed to hit fence posts with it, just not too hard.”
–Webber
“I should poke it into a freshly made fence, to see if it's done.”
–Warly
“Not nice to hit friends”
–Wormwood
“There's a right tool for every job.”
–Winona
“A sword against fences... we've all lost our senses!”
–Wortox
“Spinny pokey stick!”
–Wurt
“Huh. I didn't know people used swords to fix their fences.”
–Walter
“I appreciate specialized tools. Especially when I can still hit things with them.”
–Wanda
“Rotates rotatable structures like fences, signs and chairs.”
-
The Fencing Sword is a Melee Weapon and Tool. It requires 2 Flint and 1 Spear to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Fencing Sword deals the same amount of damage as the Spear (34), but has more Durability than the Spear (200 vs the Spear's 150). It has a greatly reduced attack speed. It can also be used to rotate Wood Fences, Junky Fences, Wood Gates, Directional Signs, all types of Chairs, Mannequins, and all types of Masts placed on land, including Dragonfly Wing Masts.
Tips[edit | edit source]
The Fencing Sword's reduced attack speed can be mostly negated by moving slightly after attacking.
Since the Fencing Sword uses a Spear in its crafting recipe and has much higher durability, crafting a Fencing Sword with a low-durability Spear is an effective way to maximize resources.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Fencing Sword uses the Spear's unused "Spear Jab" animation, where the character lunges forward with the weapon to poke the enemy.
The Fencing Sword was introduced alongside Wickerbottom's Character Update.

Tóm tắt

Kiếm kiếm là một vũ khí và công cụ cận chiến. Nó cần 2 Đá Lửa và 1 Giáo để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu.

{{Scrapbook Info|Rotates rotatable structures like fences, signs and chairs.}}
The '''Fencing Sword''' is a [[Weapon#Melee weapons|Melee Weapon]] and [[Tool]]. It requires 2 [[Flint]] and 1 [[Spear]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

The Fencing Sword deals the same amount of damage as the Spear (34), but has more [[Durability]] than the Spear (200 vs the Spear's 150). It has a greatly reduced attack speed. It can also be used to rotate [[Wood Fence|Wood Fences]], [[Junky Fence|Junky Fences]], [[Wood Gate|Wood Gates]], [[Directional Sign|Directional Signs]], all types of [[Chair|Chairs]], [[Mannequin|Mannequins,]] and all types of [[Mast|Masts]] placed on land, including [[Dragonfly Wing Mast|Dragonfly Wing Masts]].

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Fencing Sword's reduced attack speed can be mostly negated by moving slightly after attacking.
* Since the Fencing Sword uses a Spear in its crafting recipe and has much higher durability, crafting a Fencing Sword with a low-durability Spear is an effective way to maximize resources.

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Fencing Sword uses the Spear's unused "Spear Jab" animation, where the character lunges forward with the weapon to poke the enemy.
* The Fencing Sword was introduced alongside [[Wickerbottom]]'s [[Don't Starve Together/Version History|Character Update]].
